intended_use_full: Prenuvo Body Composition is a software medical device (SaMD) which is intended for non-invasive fat, muscle and organ quantification. Designed to utilize DICOM-compliant magnetic-resonance image datasets acquired from compatible MR Systems, it displays the internal structure of the body, including the liver. Other physical parameters derived from the images may also be produced.
